about.label: Performance Advisory
about.title: Technology that sells.
about.philosophy: We believe every business, of any size and segment, has a next leap to take. Salto exists to make sure yours happens.
about.story: Technology is essential to reduce costs and automate processes. But the main engine of any business is selling. Salto was born to unite these two worlds in a single partner: end-to-end sales strategy, powered by the best technology available.
about.founderCredential: 20+ years in sales across multiple segments · Post-grad in Sales & Marketing, FGV
about.partnerDescription: Websites, platforms, automations and AI with the best technologies on the market. Because real technology makes a difference in results.
